name: APx Acquisition Corp. I Class A Ordinary Share
summary: APx Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company may pursue an initial business combination target in any stage of its corporate evolution or in any industry or sector in the Americas, Europe and Asia Pacific regions. APx Acquisition Corp. I is headquartered in Menlo Park, California.
